sections.content: The action was rejected because it follows a known edge. I need to use the state_graph to find untried actions. Let me check what actions are available from state 35 and other states.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Use state_graph to find untried actions
print("=== State graph info ===")
print(f"Current state: {state_graph.current}")
print(f"Frontier: {state_graph.frontier()}")

# Check tried actions from state 35
print(f"\nTried actions from state 35: {state_graph.tried_actions(35)}")
print(f"Neighbors of 35: {state_graph.neighbors(35)}")

# Check tried actions from other states
for sid in [34, 36, 37, 38, 39]:
    print(f"\nState {sid}:")
    print(f"  Tried: {state_graph.tried_actions(sid)}")
    print(f"  Neighbors: {state_graph.neighbors(sid)}")

# Check what valid actions are from current state
print(f"\nValid actions: {valid_actions}")

# Let's inspect state 38 frame to see what's there
frame38 = state_graph.frame_from_state(38)
seg38 = frame38.segmentation
print("\n=== State 38 colored nodes ===")
for node in seg38['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in 'MOwp':
        print(f"  color={node['color']} pixels={node['pixels']} boundary={node['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
